headline: Jacobs to support data-driven mobility improvements in Nashville
summary: DALLAS, May 04, 2026--Jacobs (NYSE: J) has been awarded a multi-year contract by the Metropolitan Government of Nashville and Davidson County’s Department of Transportation and Multimodal Infrastructure (NDOT) to deliver architecture and engineering services in support of the city’s transformative Choose How You Move program.
